title: El Coyote
overview: The Italian mafia takes on the Mexican cartel on the Mexican border. The cartel has captured the son of an ex-mobster in witness protection. He calls on his mob buddies to come to Arizona to help him.

trailers.title: El Coyote Trailer Opens in theaters October 4, 2019
